description_long: This is a rectangular, modern digital projector with a matte dark gray exterior. The front face features a prominent circular lens assembly, slightly offset to the right, surrounded by a metallic ring and a small round sensor or button nearby. The left side of the front panel has a series of horizontal ventilation slats, while the right side is smooth except for the lens. The rear panel is densely populated with various input/output ports, including HDMI, VGA, USB, and audio jacks, as well as a power socket and additional ventilation. The left side panel contains a grid of control buttons and a large rectangular vent, while the top and right sides are mostly featureless except for a subtle brand logo on the top. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for placement in offices, classrooms, or public urban spaces.
description: A sleek, rectangular dark gray projector with a prominent lens, multiple rear ports, and side ventilation. The design is modern and functional, with a subtle brand logo on top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large circular lens, a small round button or sensor, and horizontal ventilation slats on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a grid of control buttons and a large rectangular vent, with the rest of the body smooth and unadorned.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a variety of input/output ports, a power socket, and a large vent, indicating connectivity and cooling features.
description_view_3: Right side view is mostly plain, showing the solid, unbroken surface of the projector's casing.
attribute_brand_logo: A white, rectangular brand logo is visible on the top center of the projector, but the brand name is not legible.
attribute_lens_type: Fixed short-throw lens, circular with a metallic ring and possible adjustment ring around the perimeter.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located on the left side, featuring a grid of tactile buttons with directional arrows and function icons, arranged in a rectangular layout.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Ventilation is provided by horizontal slats on the front left and a large rectangular grill on the left side, as well as a mesh-like vent on the rear panel.
